x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA security configuration ensures Now Assist only responds to authenticated users and respects data access controls within conversations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure authentication requirements for all VA channels. Test security controls end-to-end. Target: 80%+ of active channels requiring login. Now Assist VA security must match your organization's data protection requirements.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[VA security configuration ensures Now Assist only responds to authenticated users and respects data access controls within conversations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>VA Security and Authentication</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_channel');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active VA channels found',
            finding: 'No active VA channels found. Authentication configuration cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaSecured = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_channel');
    gaSecured.addQuery('active', true);
    gaSecured.addQuery('requires_login', true);
    gaSecured.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaSecured.query();
    var secured = gaSecured.next() ? parseInt(gaSecured.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((secured / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of active VA channels require authentication (' + secured + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of VA channels require authentication. Now Assist VA respects data access controls and will not surface unauthorized data in AI responses.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - secured) + ' VA channel(s) allow unauthenticated access (' + pct + '% secured, target: 80%+). Now Assist VA must authenticate users to enforce data access controls in AI responses.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of VA channels require authentication. Most VA channels allow unauthenticated access — Now Assist VA AI responses may surface data without proper access control enforcement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module>
<number>CHK0006137</number>
<order>120</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure authentication requirements for all VA channels. Test security controls end-to-end. Target: 80%+ of active channels requiring login. Now Assist VA security must match your organization's data protection requirements.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1f</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
